adFailure.description: Generate an error for GetAds ~1/10th of the time

adManualGc.description: Trigger full manual garbage collections in the ad service

adHighCpu.description: Trigger high CPU load in the ad service

cartFailure.description: Generate an error whenever EmptyCart is called

emailMemoryLeak.description: Simulate a memory leak in the email service

failedReadinessProbe.description: Force the readiness probe to fail — Kubernetes only

imageSlowLoad.description: Inject a delay into product image loading via Envoy fault injection

kafkaQueueProblems.description: Overload the Kafka queue and introduce a consumer-side delay

llmInaccurateResponse.description: Mock LLM returns an inaccurate product review summary for product ID L9ECAV7KIM

llmRateLimitError.description: Mock LLM intermittently returns HTTP 429 rate limit errors

loadGeneratorFloodHomepage.description: Flood the homepage with a large number of requests from the load generator

paymentFailure.description: Generate an error when calling the payment service charge method

paymentUnreachable.description: Use a bad address for payment service to simulate it being unavailable

productCatalogFailure.description: Fail GetProduct requests for product ID OLJCESPC7Z

recommendationCacheFailure.description: Create a memory leak via an exponentially growing cache (1.4x growth, 50% of requests)
